item.title: Imitation is the best form of flattery
item.dc:creator: WhoUhz

item.title: Anyone else absolutely hate these algorithms on other social media platforms?
item.description: Like just because I watched a video of someone trimming the hooves of a cow doesn’t mean I’m a ranch hand living in Montana looking for tips on how to improve my hoof trimming technique lol. Any time I click on anything on any other social media app, my suggestions go nuts and I have to constantly click on “not interested” or whatever. These algorithms for suggestions are supposed to drive engagement but all it does is annoy the shit out of me. I like Imgur just being random, usersub is great, I can watch whatever nonsense video and the app doesn’t assume I’m a connoisseur of that thing.
item.dc:creator: CapnAdorable

item.title: Why is this goat so wunky
item.dc:creator: HoutCuteness

item.title: A very WHOLESOME Saturday dump that will brighten your day (hope I made you smile)
item.description:
1. Finally someone said it!
2. When that “ahhh” at the end hits just right
3. Good boy helps on the farm
4. When you finally get a kiss from your crush
5. Tara celebrating her gold medal with her husband
6. Anyway, you're probably wondering how I got here
7. Cat recognizes the comfiest place in the house
8. A wholesome Olympic moment
9. Beaver bringing carrots to his friends
10. Now THAT is food
11. SOSIG me
12. A father builds a Ferris wheel for his daughter
13. Happy sheep wants to be among the doggos
14. I want to remind the world this! Please, listen to this guy's shirt! It's a very important message
15. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. It was inspired by games like The Stanley Parable. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you! Thank you for supporting our dream and helping us share our wild adventure with the world!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
